title: com.temis.decision.requested.v1
description: Data payload of a temis command event (ADR-0033): a request to evaluate a single decision, a whole model graph, or a decision-flow (DRG). Register in clio (register-event-schema) so malformed commands are rejected at write time, before temis-clio-worker ever sees them.

modelId.description: Content-addressed model id. With `decision`, evaluate that one decision; without it, evaluate the whole model graph. Mutually exclusive with `flowId`.

flowId.description: Content-addressed flow id (a decision-flow / DRG). Mutually exclusive with `modelId`.

decision.description: Name or id of the single decision to evaluate. Only valid together with `modelId`.

input.description: The FEEL input for the evaluation. Numbers may be given as JSON numbers or exact decimal strings (ADR-0007).

explain.description: When true, the result event carries the decision trace (data.trace).
